description: Bento Grid design tokens — modular layout with unequal-sized rectangular cells in a CSS Grid. Layout-first style; color/content is flexible (Apple light, dark neon, glass, brutal variants).

columns.comment: 3-4 columns is the sweet spot; 5+ gets chaotic

gap.comment: MUST be consistent across all cells — this creates the bento box divider feel

borderRadius.comment: sharp corners feel wrong for bento — it's a soft material

variants.comment: asymmetry is the whole point — never all equal

backgroundColor.comment: flexible — bento is layout-first, color is secondary

heroHeadline.comment: biggest text on the page, lives in the hero cell

cellBody.comment: keep short — max 2-3 lines per cell

responsive.mobile: 1 column, all spans reset to auto

ironRules: cells MUST be unequal sizes (asymmetry is the point)
gap MUST be consistent (one value, never per-cell margins)
each cell MUST be self-contained (no content bleeding)
one hero cell anchors the grid (usually 2×2)
max 2-3 lines of text per cell
variants: apple-light — grey cells on white, product imagery
dark-neon — dark cells with per-cell neon accent
colorful — each cell a different brand color
glass — cells are glassmorphism cards over aurora
brutal — cells are neo-brutalist cards with offset shadow
